intro.text: You wake up in a foggy forest. A narrow path splits ahead.
intro.prompt: mysterious foggy forest path cinematic lighting fantasy

river.text: You arrive at a rushing river. The water looks deep and cold.
river.prompt: wild forest river rushing water cinematic fantasy illustration

hill.text: From the hilltop you see smoke rising from a cabin in the valley.
hill.prompt: foggy forest valley with wooden cabin chimney smoke cinematic fantasy

cabin.text: You reach the old wooden cabin. The door slowly creaks open...
cabin.prompt: old wooden cabin in misty forest at dusk cinematic lighting

ending.text: Inside the cabin you find warmth, food, and shelter. You survived the night.
ending.prompt: warm cabin interior fireplace cozy fantasy illustration
